summary: Classified remaining localization string extraction work and added a safe first audit batch of direct SwiftUI/accessibility source keys without editing product copy or Swift source.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-localization-extraction-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: The repo had localization resources and parity checks, but no maintained inventory explaining which remaining Swift strings were already covered, safe to key, debug/system-only, or deferred for formatting/code-routing work.
contract_status_changes.after: docs/workflows/localization-string-inventory.md now classifies the remaining string surface, names the safe extraction rule, records the extracted groups, and calls out dynamic/plural/domain/helper strings as deferred rather than pretending they are localized by resource keys alone.

contract_status_changes.before: The English source key set covered the foundation batch only and missed several direct SwiftUI/accessibility literals from Today, Home, Write, Train, Career, Build Info, and digest surfaces.
contract_status_changes.after: Added 58 direct SwiftUI/accessibility source keys to every locale file while keeping all non-English values as English placeholders and leaving product copy unchanged.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-localization-extraction-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

residual_risks: Dynamic/interpolated strings, plural forms, notification text, and domain/application String helpers still need a separate code-routing or formatting slice before they can be considered localized at runtime.
Non-English locale values remain English placeholders and require translation-quality review in a later slice.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning unrelated to localization.
recommended_next_reason: The next high-leverage localization slice should target dynamic/plural/interpolated strings and decide where String(localized:), LocalizedStringKey, or .stringsdict belongs without starting translation work.
